boundary_or_legality_failure.diagnosis: authoritative coordinator, replay, viewer boundary, or action ABI defect
boundary_or_legality_failure.next: invalidate the run and repair the evidence boundary before further search

economics_failure_only.diagnosis: Python full-clone tree search is useful but not a viable label generator
economics_failure_only.next: retain the algorithm result and move search behind the Rules BranchDriver before data generation

label_instability.diagnosis: the declared traversal budget does not define a learnable visit target
label_instability.next: stop before training and preregister a new budget or target-pruning experiment

pass.diagnosis: Teacher-1 is strong, stable, legal, replayable, and affordable enough for a bounded student test
pass.next: freeze t1-128-w4 and run paired chosen-versus-visit distillation at training seeds 197, 419, and 887

tree_or_accounting_failure.diagnosis: Teacher-1 is not producing the declared adaptive tree or budget
tree_or_accounting_failure.next: repair the reference implementation and rerun all cells

weak_teacher.diagnosis: uniform priors and random leaves do not produce useful Teacher-1 supervision
weak_teacher.next: do not distill; isolate frozen policy priors and value leaves as separate teacher ablations

requirements: bind the canonical SHA-256 of this contract
bind a terminal Teacher-0 recovery manifest and its exact policy/value checkpoint
bind a same-host latency calibration artifact
map every Teacher-1 budget to a Teacher-0 sims/action control within 10% realized p50 decision latency

hidden_information_boundary.audit_private_authority: deal seeds and authority witnesses may exist only in the audit bundle
hidden_information_boundary.learner_view: acting viewer observation and legal mask only
hidden_information_boundary.method: separate determinized PUCT trees per sampled world; not ISMCTS or public-belief search
hidden_information_boundary.opponent_hand: absent from viewer-safe protocol frames and learner inputs

host.description: MacBook Pro Mac16,5; 16 CPU cores; 128 GB unified memory

opponents.checkpoint: the recovery policy_value arm, preselected before result inspection, frozen by exact SHA-256, and played by deterministic argmax
opponents.random: uniform random over the current encoded legal mask
opponents.scripted: the fixed villains embedded in competency scenarios S1-S5
opponents.search: Teacher-0 flat determinized Monte Carlo matched by realized p50 latency

predictions: t1-128-w4 wins at least 55% against t1-8-w4, 55% against the frozen checkpoint, and 80% against random
at 128 traversals repeated searches agree on the top action at least 70% of roots and have median Jensen-Shannon divergence at most 0.10
mean tree nodes and mean maximum depth both increase from 8 to 128 traversals
t1-128-w4 reaches 20% correct on at least one of S1, S2, or S5 and no S1-S5 result is over 10 points below random
t1-128-w4 remains at or below 500 ms p95, at or above two labels/second/worker, and below 0.1% playout-cap hits
question: Does the existing deterministic multi-world PUCT Teacher-1 produce sufficiently strong, stable, legal, replayable, and affordable visit/value targets to justify a three-seed distillation experiment?

student_stage.primary_comparison: normalized root visits versus one-hot chosen action, both with root-value supervision

teacher.budget_semantics: total adaptive tree traversals per decision across all worlds; root visits sum exactly to this budget
